signals.raw:
Based on the search results provided, there is no breaking news from today (April 22, 2026) about GDP that would move prediction markets. The most recent GDP-related news in these results is from **April 9, 2026**, which reported that **US fourth-quarter 2025 GDP growth was downgraded to 0.5%**[1], but this is nearly two weeks old and would have already been priced into markets.

signals.headline: ETH Technical Pattern Signals 170% Rally Potential to $8,500 in 2026 | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH Technical Pattern Signals 170% Rally Potential to $8,500 in 2026 | NO | MED confidence**  
Analysis cites ETH/BTC bottoming in April 2026 matching 2021 bull pattern, with support retest; on-chain data shows Ethereum Foundation staking 70K ETH ($143M) and ETF inflows ($11.6B total).[1][3] No firm confirmation of execution.

signals.headline: XRP Institutional Adoption Grows with 5 Spot ETFs Holding $1B | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Institutional Adoption Grows with 5 Spot ETFs Holding $1B | NO | LOW confidence**  
US spot XRP ETFs manage over $1B in XRP amid price testing $2.00 support; broader 2026 predictions target $1.80-$5, but recent drops to $1.33 signal weakness.[1][2][3][5] No new resolutions announced.
